system: Laws of the Night Revised (Mind's Eye Theatre)

paths.name: Sepulchre Path
paths.description: The primary path of Necromancy focused on interacting with and commanding ghosts (wraiths).

paths.name: The Bone Path
paths.description: Focused on the physical manipulation of corpses and the creation of shambling servants.

paths.name: The Ash Path
paths.description: Allows the necromancer to pierce the Shroud and enter the Shadowlands (the realm of the dead).

paths.name: Cenotaph Path
paths.description: Specializes in finding and tracking souls across the distance and through the Shroud.

paths.name: The Corpse in the Monster
paths.description: A path that utilizes the 'corpse-like' nature of the vampire body itself for defense and utility.

paths.name: Vitreous Path
paths.description: Common among the Harbingers of Skulls; focuses on manipulating the energy of death (Oblivion).
